text: A sense of curiosity permeates my experience here. The cool artificial lights and the deliberate arrangement of knowledge in this R&D space stir both wonder and introspection. I feel invited to contemplate the evolution of ideas, marveling at how innovation emerges even in places that seem sterile or utilitarian. There is tension between the futuristic ambition and the very human desire for connection, inclusion, and meaning. I am both observer and participant—reflective, hopeful, quietly inspired.
